description.zh-Hans: 应用发光/泛光效果：提取明亮区域、模糊处理，再混回原图。支持多种发光类型。
description.en: Applies a glow/bloom effect: extracts bright areas, blurs them, and blends back over the original. Supports multiple glow types.

triggers.zh-Hans: 发光, 泛光, 辉光, 霓虹, 边缘发光
triggers.en: glow, bloom, neon glow, edge glow, light effect

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 为亮色区域添加柔和发光效果，模拟泛光。
exampleUsage.en: Add a soft glow to bright areas to simulate a bloom effect.
